title: Christmas Land Extras
description: Adds more holiday themed foods and crops to support the Christmas Land Mod
body:
This mod is somewhat dependant on my Christmas Land Mod. Please make sure to install it as well as some drops will be more contextual.

This mod adds in many new christmas themed foods, a new biome where you can collect cinnamon, two new crops that allow you to grow sweet potatoes and ginger, And some recipes to use the crops in. All Christmas themed!

Including:

Yams with marshmallows

Toasted marshmallows

Honey glazed Ham

Mashoed potatoes

Ice Cream

Apple Pie

This mod was designed and created by my youngest daughter.



The Yams and Ginger can be found in smaller farm structures located in jungle, plains and taiga type biomes. They can be cultivated on farmland just like vanilla crops.  Use an uncooked yam, or ginger to plant it on a farmland block.
